stateModel.absentInvariant: version=0 and no pending or committed transaction exists
stateModel.pendingInvariant: version=expectedVersion+1, transactionId and payloadDigest are immutable, committed=false
stateModel.committedInvariant: version is immutable, committed=true, receipt chains previousReceiptHash and payloadDigest
stateModel.allowedTransitions: ABSENT->PENDING, COMMITTED(n)->PENDING(n+1), PENDING(n)->COMMITTED(n); no decrement, overwrite or branch

read.invariant: response is authenticated and receipt chain verifies to the deployment-pinned authority identity

compareAndSwapPending.precondition: currentVersion equals expectedVersion and no different transaction occupies expectedVersion+1
compareAndSwapPending.success: durably create exactly one PENDING record at expectedVersion+1 and return authenticated receipt
compareAndSwapPending.conflict: VERSION_CONFLICT with current authenticated state; no mutation
compareAndSwapPending.replay: same idempotencyKey and request digest returns byte-identical logical result

commit.precondition: matching PENDING exists and localPublicationReceipt proves durable final-target identity
commit.success: atomically transition matching PENDING to COMMITTED and return chained authenticated receipt
commit.replay: same idempotencyKey and request digest returns byte-identical logical result

recover.rule: commit only when pending identity and durable final target match; otherwise retain pending and block new publication
recover.postRenameRule: a matching durable final target completes the pending transaction without republishing bytes
recover.missingTargetRule: retain consumed version and require operator-reviewed abort policy; never decrement or reuse version

identityAndAuthorization.serverIdentity: deployment-pinned certificate-or-public-key fingerprint outside copyable workspace
identityAndAuthorization.clientIdentity: deployment-bound workload identity with non-exportable credential
identityAndAuthorization.roles: reader,writer,auditor with writer denied administrative rollback/delete
identityAndAuthorization.credentialStorage: external secret or workload-identity control plane, never repository or caller payload
identityAndAuthorization.rotation: dual-pin overlap with independently reviewed deployment change and receipt-chain continuity

idempotency.sameKeySameDigest: return original authenticated result without new state transition
idempotency.sameKeyDifferentDigest: IDEMPOTENCY_MISMATCH terminal error with no mutation
idempotency.retention: at least authority state retention period and never shorter than pending recovery window

errorAndRetryModel.VERSION_CONFLICT: read authenticated current state, then stop for caller reconciliation
errorAndRetryModel.UNAVAILABLE: bounded exponential backoff with same idempotency key; exhaustion leaves publication blocked

recoveryAndRollback.pendingBeforeLocalWrite: authority PENDING receipt must be durable before staging publication
recoveryAndRollback.commitAfterLocalDurability: COMMITTED request only after final target and parent directory durability are verified
recoveryAndRollback.postRenameCrash: recovery recognizes matching final-target identity and commits without rewriting
recoveryAndRollback.coordinatedRollback: authority sequence and receipt chain cannot be reset by workspace, deployment writer or target administrator
recoveryAndRollback.deletion: state deletion is denied to runtime roles and any administrative deletion emits independent audit evidence
recoveryAndRollback.receiptChain: each receipt includes previousReceiptHash, version, transactionId, payloadDigest and authoritySequence

localSafetyVerification.crossVolume: target volume identity is verified before authority CAS; unsupported cross-volume publication fails before state consumption
localSafetyVerification.directoryDurability: staging and target parent directories are fsynced or platform-equivalent durability is positively acknowledged
localSafetyVerification.descriptorReads: state, receipts and target identity use descriptor-based no-follow reads with identity revalidation
localSafetyVerification.lockIdentity: lock owner binds pid, process-start identity and boot identity; PID alone is insufficient
localSafetyVerification.readAfterWrite: every authority transition is read back and authenticated before the next local action
